title: Actor
description: A first-class actor identity (chp-application-contract.md section 3.1, proposal 0034). An OPTIONAL, structured, caller-asserted identity enriching an invocation beyond the free-form subject (which stays the host's verified accountability record). Every field but id is omit-when-empty.

type.description: The kind of actor. Spans the CHP actor breadth.

owner.description: The actor that owns/operates this actor (e.g. the human behind an agent).

organization.description: The provider/organization security-domain boundary this actor belongs to.

trust_level.description: Deployment-defined trust classification (configuration concern, not prescribed).

credentials_ref.description: A reference (never the secret) to the actor's credential material.

authority_refs.description: References to authority (e.g. mandate ids) the actor holds.
